'''Glena''' was a descendant of the colonists of [[Eol Sha]] that were relocated to the world of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Glena was the wife of [[Warton]] early in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] rule. She was one of the many settlers who was vaporized by an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] during [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] [[Attack on Dantooine (Galactic Civil War)|attack]] on Dantooine in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].
